name: Reflex Cat Pocket Treat Sensitive 60g
description: It contributes to coat and skin health with its miraculous krill, biotin, and vitamins. Thanks to its taurine content, it supports the immune system, heart health, and visual functions. Composition: Derivatives of vegetable origin, meat and animal derivatives, cereals, oils and fats, vegetable protein extracts, yeasts (1% brewer’s yeasts), molluscs and crustaceans (0.3% dried krill source of fatty acids omega3), minerals. Nutrient Components Crude Protein %29 Fat Content %20 Crude Fibre %1,7 Crude Ash %6 Nutritional Supplements Vitamins: Vitamin A 6000 IU, Vitamin D3 400 IU, Vitamin E 100 mg, Taurine 1000 mg, Biotin 300 μg. Trace Elements: Zn 100 mg. Antioxidants. Colourants.
